name: auto-app-selection
description: run app selection workflow (usecase to app list and architecture recommendation)

name: auto-app-design
description: run app design workflow (microservice architecture design document generation)

name: auto-app-dev-microservice
description: run full microservice app development workflow on Azure

name: auto-batch-dev
description: run full batch dev workflow (Azure resource, coding, deploy, review)

name: qa-knowledge-management
description: run QA knowledge management workflow (qa/ files to knowledge/ D01-D21 documents)

name: self-improve
description: run self-improvement loop (code quality scan, fix, verify)

name: auto-context-review
description: auto context review trigger for copilot-auto-review workflow

name: auto-qa
description: auto QA trigger for copilot-auto-qa workflow

name: create-subissues
description: trigger Sub Issue creation from subissues.md in PR

name: plan-only
description: PR contains only plan.md and subissues.md (no implementation files)

name: setup-labels
description: trigger label setup workflow (run once after repository creation, re-runnable for updates)
